detailedExemplarData.title: INFORME DEL PROYECTO PERSONAL âRecuperaciÃ³n despuÃ©s de una lesiÃ³n graveâ

strengths: Effective use of thinking ATL skills through focused research on anatomy and treatment options
Concrete examples of self-management and reflectionâadjusting exercise intensity and seeking support
Critical-thinking in adapting care (padding the hematoma, pursuing psychological support)
Demonstration of research ATL in reducing anxiety and informing treatment decisions
weaknesses: ATL skill categories are not explicitly named when describing their contribution to goal achievement
Limited evidence showing how ATL skills directly enhanced the quality of the walking-with-muleta outcome
Product-focused ATL applications need clearer linkage to improvements in the final recovery plan
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: You provide vivid examples of applying ATL skillsâresearch, self-management and critical thinkingâto support your recovery process. To deepen this section, label each ATL category explicitly and show how these skills elevated the quality of your walking-with-muleta product, using concrete evidence.

strengths: Clear and compelling statement of the learning goal with a convincing personal context
Rich development of personal interest with multiple, illustrative examples
Detailed, measurable success criteria covering weight, technique, adaptation, and speed/resistance
Well-structured physiotherapy plan including dates, professional evidence, and targeted exercises
weaknesses: Lack of specified key resources and sequencing to demonstrate feasibility within the timeframe
Recovery plan table steps are not explicitly linked to their success criteria
Transition and suture removal phases are missing connections to relevant criteria
Introductory description to the success criteria could be more concise and focused
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: You established a strong foundation by articulating a meaningful learning goal and connecting it to personal experience. Your success criteria are thorough and measurable, and the physiotherapy schedule is detailed. To strengthen planning further, map each recovery step directly to its criteria, specify necessary resources and sequencing, and refine the introductory narrative for precision.

strengths: Structured evaluation against each success criterion (weight bearing, technique, adaptation, speed/resistance)
Insightful reflection on personal growth in resilience and adaptability
Thorough analysis of weight-bearing progression, detailing challenges and targeted actions
weaknesses: Personal learning outcomes are not routinely linked back to specific success criteria with supporting examples
Evaluation of technique would benefit from quantitative data (e.g., duration walked, kilograms supported)
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: Your reflecting section excels in breaking down performance against each criterion and offering genuine insights into emotional and resilience growth. To enhance this further, tie reflections directly to criteria with concrete examples and incorporate quantitative measures to substantiate your technique evaluations.

annotations.comment: Structuring your evaluation against each success criterion (Descarga de peso, TÃ©cnica, AdaptaciÃ³n, Velocidad y resistencia) demonstrates thorough criteria-based reflection.
The investigation and research you conducted to understand anatomy and treatment options shows strong application of the thinking ATL skills to support your recovery.

You clearly state the learning goal âconseguir recuperarme despuÃ©s de una lesiÃ³n graveâ and provide a compelling personal context, establishing a convincing connection between interest and objective.
The discussion of personal interest is richly developed with multiple examples, demonstrating a strong rationale for your learning goal.
You effectively describe how self-management and reflection were applied, with concrete examples of adjusting exercise intensity and seeking support, showing skillful ATL use.
Your success criteria table presents multiple, detailed and measurable criteria across weight, technique, adaptation, and speed/resistance, providing clear standards for success.
Consider specifying key resources (e.g., professional guidance, equipment) and sequencing to reinforce the feasibility of achieving the expected product within the timeframe.
Your plan table outlines key recovery steps but leaves the criteria column blank; explicitly link each step to its relevant success criteria for clarity.
Your example of padding the hematoma and seeking psychological support demonstrates critical thinking applied to improve your product outcome.
To align with ATL terminology, explicitly name the skill categories (e.g., self-management, communication) when explaining how each contributed to achieving your learning goal.
In the product-based ATL application, consider adding evidence of how these skills directly enhanced the quality of your walking-with-muleta outcome.
You provide insightful reflection on personal growth in resilience and adaptability, illustrating how the project impacted your self-awareness and emotional skills.
Enhance your reflection by linking personal learning outcomes to specific success criteria with supporting evidence or examples.
Your evaluation of weight-bearing progression clearly explains initial challenges and how targeted actions led to achieving this criterion.
Consider including quantitative data (e.g., duration walked, weight supported in kg) to strengthen the evidence in your technique evaluation.
The transition and suture removal steps lack explicit linkage to success criteria; ensure all plan phases reference the related criteria.
Your elaboration on motivational aspects, such as growth beyond physical recovery, deepens the personal relevance of your learning goal.
Describing how curiosity-driven research reduced anxiety and informed your treatment demonstrates effective application of research ATL skills for your product.
Your physiotherapy plan includes clear dates, professional evidence, and targeted exercises, which enhances the feasibility and structure of your recovery plan.
Consider rephrasing the introductory sentence to the criteria list for greater conciseness and focus on product requirements.
